parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
interface Collection
interface List
abstract class AbstractCollection
abstract class AbstractList
class ArrayList {
  Object[] elementData
  int a
  size()
}
enum TimeUnit {
  DAYS
  HOURS
  MINUTES
}

Collection <|-right- List
Collection <|-- AbstractCollection
AbstractCollection <|-right- AbstractList
List <|-- AbstractList
AbstractList <|-- ArrayList
@enduml
```
